## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to review content performance and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is trending positively, with clicks up 54% week-over-week (105 more clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [UX design, CMS comparison, and enterprise topics are performing well](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Team is focusing on expanding these high-performing content areas](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Webstacks team to handle CRO optimizations, while GrowthX focuses on SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [88 articles published to date, in week 8 of engagement (6-7 weeks of active publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Significant increase in clicks (105 more) and impressions (40,000 more) compared to previous week](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Top performing content: CMS comparison articles, UX design topics, and enterprise-focused pieces](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [New batch of topics focuses on expanding successful areas: CMS comparisons, UX design, and enterprise topics](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Team is monitoring performance of refreshed content, with older batches showing 15-50% improvements in impressions and clicks per day](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

### Data Analysis and Reporting

  - [GrowthX team is implementing ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) segmentation to identify high-value content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Suggestion to connect Airtable backend for meta title and description optimization](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Team will provide more accessible reporting on content quality, including:](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [Week-over-week performance views](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [Monthly insights on top 10 articles gaining significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [Comparison of GrowthX-produced vs. internally-produced content performance](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

### CRO and SEO Optimization

  - [Webstacks team to handle CRO optimizations for high-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on meta title optimizations and SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
  - [Request for Webstacks to share micro-conversion data (e.g., downloads) to inform content scaling decisions](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)

### Performance Benchmarking

  - [Current performance considered normal for 6 weeks of content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [Expectation to see continued growth in clicks and impressions as content matures and is optimized](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Webstacks to review and comment on new content topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide updated report comparing internally-produced vs. GrowthX-produced content performance](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Webstacks to begin CRO optimizations on top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue meta title optimizations and SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
  - [Webstacks to share micro-conversion data for published articles](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Teams to monitor progress towards goal of 200-500 visitors per week](https://fathom.video/share/gn29cKvm1DZVz8L4j3id3yR5WRiMssKA?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
